command: Robot, please use the garlic press to crush two cloves of garlic. Heat up the frying pan on the stove and add two tablespoons of olive oil. Cook until the vegetables are tender, then add a can of olives and a diced tomato. Stir to combine and cook for another 2-3 minutes. Serve the vegetable and olive sauté in a ceramic bowl.
